purpose: Independent, read-only SQL references for deterministic result-equivalence scoring.

templates.product_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products;
templates.top_customer_orders_5: SELECT c.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 5;
templates.top_customer_orders_3: SELECT c.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 3;
templates.average_order_revenue: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS avg_order_revenue FROM (SELECT od.order_id, SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount)) AS order_revenue FROM order_details od GROUP BY od.order_id) totals;
templates.employee_order_ranking: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM employees e LEFT JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, employee_name LIMIT 10;
templates.top_employee: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM employees e LEFT JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, employee_name LIMIT 1;
templates.highest_product_price: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price DESC, product_name LIMIT 1;
templates.lowest_product_price: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price ASC, product_name LIMIT 1;
templates.category_product_ranking: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY product_count DESC, c.category_name LIMIT 10;
templates.largest_category: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY product_count DESC, c.category_name LIMIT 1;
templates.smallest_category: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY product_count ASC, c.category_name LIMIT 1;
templates.employee_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employees;
templates.order_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders;
templates.customer_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers;
templates.supplier_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS supplier_count FROM suppliers;
templates.average_freight: SELECT ROUND(AVG(freight)::numeric, 2) AS avg_freight FROM orders;
templates.total_freight: SELECT ROUND(SUM(freight)::numeric, 2) AS total_freight FROM orders;
templates.top_supplier: SELECT s.company_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM suppliers s LEFT JOIN products p ON s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id GROUP BY s.supplier_id, s.company_name ORDER BY product_count DESC, s.company_name LIMIT 1;
templates.highest_order_value: SELECT od.order_id, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS order_revenue FROM order_details od GROUP BY od.order_id ORDER BY order_revenue DESC, od.order_id LIMIT 1;
templates.price_between_20_30: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products WHERE unit_price BETWEEN 20 AND 30 ORDER BY unit_price, product_name LIMIT 10;
templates.customers_by_city: SELECT company_name, city FROM customers ORDER BY city, company_name LIMIT 10;
templates.london_customer_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers WHERE city = 'London';
templates.out_of_stock_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS out_of_stock_products FROM products WHERE units_in_stock = 0;
templates.total_units_in_stock: SELECT SUM(units_in_stock) AS total_units_in_stock FROM products;
templates.top_customer_spending_1: SELECT c.company_name, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.company_name ORDER BY total_spent DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 1;
templates.top_customer_spending_5: SELECT c.company_name, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.company_name ORDER BY total_spent DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 5;
templates.orders_by_month: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)::date AS order_month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY order_month ORDER BY order_month LIMIT 10;
templates.latest_orders_5: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, c.company_name, e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN employees e ON o.employee_id = e.employee_id ORDER BY o.order_date DESC, o.order_id DESC LIMIT 5;
templates.never_ordered_products: SELECT p.product_name FROM products p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_details od WHERE od.product_id = p.product_id) ORDER BY p.product_name LIMIT 5;
templates.revenue_by_country: SELECT c.country, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY revenue DESC, c.country LIMIT 10;
templates.top_products_quantity_5: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(od.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold FROM products p JOIN order_details od ON p.product_id = od.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC, p.product_name LIMIT 5;
templates.top_employee_1997: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM employees e JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.order_date < DATE '1998-01-01' GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, employee_name LIMIT 1;
templates.customers_without_orders: SELECT c.company_name FROM customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) ORDER BY c.company_name LIMIT 5;
templates.orders_by_shipper: SELECT s.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM shippers s LEFT JOIN orders o ON s.shipper_id = o.ship_via GROUP BY s.shipper_id, s.company_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, s.company_name;
templates.average_price_by_supplier: SELECT s.company_name, ROUND(AVG(p.unit_price)::numeric, 2) AS avg_unit_price FROM suppliers s JOIN products p ON s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id GROUP BY s.supplier_id, s.company_name ORDER BY avg_unit_price DESC, s.company_name LIMIT 10;
templates.above_average_orders: SELECT order_id, order_revenue FROM (SELECT od.order_id, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS order_revenue FROM order_details od GROUP BY od.order_id) totals WHERE order_revenue > (SELECT AVG(order_revenue) FROM (SELECT SUM(unit_price * quantity * (1 - discount)) AS order_revenue FROM order_details GROUP BY order_id) averages) ORDER BY order_revenue DESC, order_id LIMIT 10;
